import React from "react"; import "../Styles/About.css"; function About() { return (

About Me

Hi! I’m Vishal, a passionate Full Stack Developer and a B.Sc. Statistics undergraduate at PSG College of Arts & Science, Coimbatore. I love transforming ideas into interactive, user-friendly web applications. My journey into coding started with curiosity about how websites and apps work — and now, I enjoy building them using modern web technologies. I specialize in JavaScript, Node.js, React, and Express, and I have experience working with MongoDB and REST APIs. I’ve also built projects like a Bookstore Application and a Movie Search Website, where I focused on seamless UI and efficient backend logic. Beyond coding, I’m analytical and data-driven — my statistics background helps me think logically and make informed decisions while solving complex problems. I enjoy learning new technologies and constantly improving my skills to stay updated in the fast-paced tech world. My goal is to become a skilled full stack developer who builds scalable, creative, and impactful applications that make a real difference.{" "}

I love turning ideas into interactive, functional, and visually appealing applications.

); } export default About;
